etymology.description: 中國(中國) (Zhōngguó, "China") indicates the nation, 美術(美術) (měishù, "art") refers to the visual arts, and 館(館) (guǎn, "building") signifies a place, which together denote an art museum situated in China.
etymology.interpretation: 中國(中國) (Zhōngguó, "China") represents the nation. 美術(美術) (měishù, "art") focuses on visual arts, encapsulating the idea of aesthetics and creativity. 館(館) (guǎn, "building") denotes a place or hall where these artistic creations are exhibited and appreciated. Combining these, it refers to the National Art Museum of China, a place where Chinese artworks are displayed and celebrated.

examples.chinese: 中国美术馆(中國美術館)是北京的一个重要文化地标。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngguó Měishùguǎn shì Běijīng de yīgè zhòngyào wénhuà dìbiāo.
examples.english: The National Art Museum of China is an important cultural landmark in Beijing.

examples.chinese: 游客们常常去中国美术馆(遊客們常常去中國美術館)参观。
examples.pinyin: Yóukèmen chángcháng qù Zhōngguó Měishùguǎn cānguān.
examples.english: Tourists often visit the National Art Museum of China.

examples.chinese: 我昨天在中国美术馆(我昨天在中國美術館)看到了一个精彩的展览。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān zài Zhōngguó Měishùguǎn kàn dào le yīgè jīngcǎi de zhǎnlǎn.
examples.english: I saw a wonderful exhibition at the National Art Museum of China yesterday.
